summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chalet & Stay Configurator (iteration 16). All backend API endpoints working correctly - 10 models returned, all filters functional (bestemming, dak_vorm, model_vorm, min/max m²). Frontend ChaletWizard displays 3-column layout with filters, photo carousel, and pricing sidebar. Pricing verified: Plat 12 = €74.950 / €90.690 incl BTW / €1.349 lease; Zadel 18 = €128.700 / €155.727 incl BTW / €2.317 lease.
passed_tests: GET /api/chalet/models returns 10 models
GET /api/chalet/models?bestemming=pre-mantelzorg returns 5 models
GET /api/chalet/models?dak_vorm=zadeldak returns 3 models (Zadel 12, Zadel 18, Dubbel 24)
GET /api/chalet/models?model_vorm=l-vorm returns 1 model (L-Plat 16)
GET /api/chalet/models?min_m2=50&max_m2=80 returns 5 models in range
GET /api/chalet/filters returns all filter options (bestemmingen, model_vormen, dak_vormen, stijlen, suppliers)
Plat 12 pricing: €74.950 basisprijs, €90.690 incl BTW, €1.349 lease ✓
Zadel 18 pricing: €128.700 basisprijs, €155.727 incl BTW, €2.317 lease ✓
BTW calculation: 21% of basisprijs ✓
Frontend: Clicking 'Chalet & Stay' from homepage opens ChaletWizard
Frontend: 3-column layout with filters (left), content (center), pricing (right)
Frontend: Left sidebar shows Bestemming, Oppervlakte slider, Model Vorm, Dak Vorm filters
Frontend: Plat 12 auto-selected on load
Frontend: Selecting different models updates center content and right sidebar pricing
Frontend: Style buttons Modern/Luxe/Landelijk work, unavailable styles are disabled
Frontend: Landelijk disabled for Plat 12 (only Modern/Luxe), enabled for Zadel 18 (all 3)
Frontend: Specificatie tab shows model details (Oppervlakte, Slaapkamers, Leverancier, etc.)
Frontend: Samenstellen tab shows configuration options (Keuken, Badkamer, Terras, etc.)
Frontend: 'Terug naar flows' button returns to homepage
Frontend: Dak vorm filter (Zadeldak) reduces model list to 3
Frontend: Pre-Mantelzorg filter reduces model list to 5
Frontend: L-vorm filter reduces model list to 1
Frontend: Geselecteerd summary shows correct model name, supplier, stijl, and room count
Frontend: Image carousel navigation (prev/next) works correctly
Frontend: Image indicator shows correct position (1/3, 2/3, 3/3)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - 10 chalet models defined in chalet_engine.py CHALET_MODELS constant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested Chalet & Stay Configurator. Key findings: 1) 10 chalet models from 2 suppliers (Kunert Group, Arcabo). 2) All filters working: bestemming (recreatie/pre-mantelzorg), dak_vorm (6 options), model_vorm (5 options), oppervlakte slider. 3) Pricing verified: Plat 12 = €74.950/€90.690/€1.349, Zadel 18 = €128.700/€155.727/€2.317. 4) 3-column layout matches projectadmin.nl reference. 5) Style buttons correctly disable unavailable styles per model. 6) Tabs (Plattegrond, Specificatie, Samenstellen) all functional. 7) Image carousel with 3 images per style. 8) Brand colors: cream #FDF9ED bg, dark olive #244628 header, green #70C26C accents.
